title: citrus rotundifolia
intro: Citrus rotundifolia, also known as the Round Lemon or Sour Orange, is a species of citrus fruit-bearing tree native to Southeast Asia. The medicinal properties of Citrus rotundifolia include its antibacterial and anti-inflammatory properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and provide relief from respiratory issues, making it a popular ingredient in traditional medicine. Citrus rotundifolia can be prepared into herbal remedies such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
